name: Appetizer: Bacon-Wrapped Shrimp with Creamy H
recipeIngredient: 24 Uncooked large shrimp, Peeled and deveined
12 Bacon slices, Cut crosswise in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Wrap each shrimp with a piece of bacon and secure with toothpick.
3. Place wrapped shrimp on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
4. Bake for 15 minutes or until bacon is crispy.
5. Mix the remaining butter with 1/4 cup of cream cheese until smooth.
6. Spread mixture over baked shrimp.
7. Serve hot and enjoy!
